Interface PathFinder

All Known Implementing Classes:
DijkstraPathFinder
public interface PathFinder
Interface for pathfinding algorithms on the evacuation graph. Implementations compute shortest paths between nodes.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default List<Node>
    calculerChemin(Node src, Node dest)
    Deprecated.
    Use findPath(Node, Node)
    List<Node>
    findPath(Node src, Node dest)
    Computes the shortest path from source to destination.
    List<Node>
    getLastPath()
    Returns the last computed shortest path.
    default List<Node>
    getPlusCourt()
    Deprecated.
    Use getLastPath()
    default void
    recalculer()
    Deprecated.
    Use reset()
    void
    reset()
    Invalidates cached computation, forcing recalculation on next call.

  • Method Details

    • findPath

      List<Node> findPath(Node src, Node dest)
      Computes the shortest path from source to destination.
      Parameters:
      src - the starting node
      dest - the target node
      Returns:
      ordered list of nodes from src to dest (inclusive), or empty list if no path

    • reset

      void reset()
      Invalidates cached computation, forcing recalculation on next call.

    • getLastPath

      List<Node> getLastPath()
      Returns the last computed shortest path.
      Returns:
      last computed path, or empty list if none computed

    • calculerChemin

      @Deprecated default List<Node> calculerChemin(Node src, Node dest)
      Deprecated.
      Use findPath(Node, Node)

    • recalculer

      @Deprecated default void recalculer()
      Deprecated.
      Use reset()

    • getPlusCourt

      @Deprecated default List<Node> getPlusCourt()
      Deprecated.
      Use getLastPath()
